entity: 2016-17 Golden State Warriors regular-season record 67-15 (KD's first season; 1-seed in West, eventual NBA champions)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (67-15, 1st in West/Pacific). GSW went 12-0 through the first three playoff rounds before losing Game 4 of the Finals to CLE — only loss in their 16-1 playoff run.
